mapper.sql: id, dict_name, dict_type, status, remark, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET dict_name = #{dictName}, dict_type = #{dictType}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
